purpose: Human-followable actual-app demos for the complete DocPilot feature manual.

workbench-overview.goal: Open a project document from the DocPilot home and confirm its Preview.
workbench-overview.input: A synthetic project is open on the workspace home.
workbench-overview.action: Open Quick open, type README at human speed, and select the result.
workbench-overview.outcome: README.md is active with its rendered Preview visible.

tabs-and-panes-all-directions.goal: Show document split targets and move the real Terminal Pane to every supported edge.
tabs-and-panes-all-directions.input: Two document tabs and a real Terminal Pane are open.
tabs-and-panes-all-directions.action: Inspect all document split previews, create a split, then move Terminal right, top, left, and bottom.
tabs-and-panes-all-directions.outcome: Document and Terminal Pane placement is visibly supported on all four edges.

quick-open-human-typing.goal: Open a document with Quick open without instant scripted input.
quick-open-human-typing.input: README.md is active in the workbench.
quick-open-human-typing.action: Open Quick open, type beta.md character by character, and choose the result.
quick-open-human-typing.outcome: beta.md opens as the active document tab.

project-search-complete.goal: Find body text with project search and open the exact line result.
project-search-complete.input: README.md is active in the workbench.
project-search-complete.action: Open Search, type a distinctive phrase at human speed, inspect its path and line, and select it.
project-search-complete.outcome: docs/review.md opens from the chosen body-search result.

asciidoc-long-cold-cache.goal: Show truthful cold and cached Preview loading for a long synthetic AsciiDoc manual.
asciidoc-long-cold-cache.input: DocPilot has just opened a public-safe project containing manual.adoc.
asciidoc-long-cold-cache.action: Open the long file, wait for the uncached Preview, switch away, and reopen it from cache without acceleration.
asciidoc-long-cold-cache.outcome: The long outline and rendered manual appear, and cached reopen is visibly shorter.

preview-navigation-width.goal: Navigate a long Preview and adjust its symmetric reading width.
preview-navigation-width.input: A long Markdown manual is open in Preview with its outline visible.
preview-navigation-width.action: Choose an outline entry, find a phrase, then drag the reading-width boundary.
preview-navigation-width.outcome: The chosen section is visible at the adjusted centered reading width.

diff-edit-to-changes.goal: Show an actual edit followed by complete rendered Diff review.
diff-edit-to-changes.input: A committed Markdown document is open with no working change.
diff-edit-to-changes.action: Edit a sentence at human speed, open Preview Diff, and inspect multiple Changes rail entries.
diff-edit-to-changes.outcome: Added and removed content, Summary, and the selected changed location remain visible together.

preview-context-to-claude.goal: Transfer DocPilot Preview context into a real Claude CLI session.
preview-context-to-claude.input: A synthetic Markdown Preview and a closed Terminal Pane are visible.
preview-context-to-claude.action: Click a Preview block to copy its real file, line, and body payload; open Terminal, run Claude, paste, and press Enter.
preview-context-to-claude.outcome: The copied DocPilot context is submitted in the real Claude CLI; model response is not required.

terminal-open-session.goal: Open the real Terminal Pane and run a project command at human speed.
terminal-open-session.input: README.md is open and Terminal is closed.
terminal-open-session.action: Move to the Terminal button, open the Pane, create a PTY session, and type a project command.
terminal-open-session.outcome: The real shell output is visible beside the document.
